form:Form.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Legajo_Liquidacion.CONSUMO.form
form:Form.mess: ¿Está seguro que desa cancelar la operación?

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT max(STRING2NUMBER(LIQ07_CONSUMO_PER.c_consumo_per)) as maximo FROM LIQ07_CONSUMO_PER
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT C.oi_tipo_consumo FROM LIQ08_CONSUMOS as C WHERE C.oi_consumo = {#SOURCE:@oi_consumo}
')/ROWS/ROW
